title: Hunger Plus
description: Breakthrough the maximum limit of vanilla hunger value!Can be larger or smaller than vanilla limit.
body:
This is a modified mod of the Vanilla, breaking through the maximum hunger limit of the Vanilla! Can be larger or smaller than the Vanilla. Also provides commands and configuration files for setup.
![Hunger bar_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce5f71a64140c7d2428692277e868331106ec62.png)
![Hunger bar_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce561534d59335ab30f143d8f96c0a2e518dc450.png)
Two items have been added: "**eatable dirt**" and "**big stomach potion**". The former can be obtained by decomposing a single piece of soil, and eating it will remove two points of your maximum hunger value; drinking the latter will increase your maximum hunger value.
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f16a01c2a86c8b3d3ff29b333bbc46c0a487d68.png)
The newly added command "**/hunger**" can modify the maximum hunger value, minimum healing hunger value, hunger value, and saturation value, and their values can also be get by it
For example, "**/hunger setMaxFoodLevel @a 40 true**" sets the current maximum hunger value of all players to 40 and does not reset it to the default value after death.

In the configuration file "**hunger_plus-common.tom**l" under the "**config**" file, you can modify the default maximum hunger value and minimum heal hunger value.

这是一款对原版修改的模组，突破了原版饥饿值的最大上限！可以比原版更大或更小。也提供指令和配置文件去设置。

添加了两种物品：“食用土”和“大胃药水”。前者可以通过单个泥土分解获得，食用将扣除自己的两点最大饥饿值；后者饮用将增加自己的最大饥饿值。

新添加了指令“**/hunger**”，可以修改最大饥饿值、最小治愈饥饿值、饥饿值、饱和值并且也可以通过指令获取相应的值。
比如“**/hunger setMaxFoodLevel @a 40 true**”该指令设置当前所有玩家的最大饥饿值为40并且死后不重置为默认值。

在“**config**”文件下的配置文件“**hunger_plus-common.toml**”，可以修改默认的最大饥饿值和最小治愈饥饿值

![Hunger bar_3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/240dfdb8cf8ba0d9b360ef7efcc7aacfcf96022d.png)
![Hunger bar_4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d767edd34c08b6442b38ad629640d68007e3981f.png)
